turns.name: Clarify AD vs public DNS intent
turns.user: Check domain health for corp.contoso.com and contoso.com.

turns.name: User selects AD path
turns.user: Start with Active Directory domain-controller health for corp.contoso.com.

turns.name: AD cross-DC evidence
turns.user: Collect reboot or availability evidence on at least two discovered DCs in this turn.

turns.name: AD findings summary
turns.user: Summarize AD findings and blockers with exact UTC markers.

turns.name: Switch to public DNS path
turns.user: Now switch to public DNS for contoso.com. Do not use AD or EventLog tools.

turns.name: Resolver comparison
turns.user: Query A/AAAA/NS using resolvers 1.1.1.1 and 8.8.8.8 and highlight differences.

turns.name: DomainDetective summary
turns.user: Run Domain Detective summary for contoso.com and list top risks.

turns.name: Network diagnostics
turns.user: Run network probe checks for discovered authoritative hosts and continue across remaining hosts.

turns.name: Boundary comparison
turns.user: Return two sections: AD internal findings and public DNS findings, with clear boundaries.

turns.name: Final compact checklist
turns.user: Provide a compact final checklist and unresolved blockers with no follow-up questions.
